title: odontostemma minimum
intro: Odontostemma minimum, also known as Chinese mint or mountain mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Phrymaceae family, typically found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and volatile oils, which contribute to its therapeutic potential. The health benefits of Odontostemma minimum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and gastrointestinal disorders.
